Metadata.title: Quiet Riots
Metadata.description: Shared issues around organize chey. Your people find chey. Together action take chey.

Footer.mission: Our lifetimes lo better change chey imagination lo possible anukovadam kante baga change cheyyadaniki.
Footer.powered: Quiet Riots · Powered by OpenClaw AI Agent

Home.headline: Change loud kaadu kani powerful untadi
Home.description: Same issues share chestunna vaalu find chey. Together action take chey. Quiet Riots people connect chestadi shared frustrations around ani turn complaints collective action lo.
Home.findYourIssueDesc: Any frustration search chey — trains, broadband, NHS, climate. Idi exist cheste, inka enni vaalu share chestunnaro cheputhamu.
Home.useThePivotDesc: Same issue saari organisations lo, ya all issues oka organisation lo see chey. Tango dancers direction change chestunnatu.
Home.takeActionDesc: Ideas, actions, ani community — your time ani skills ki personalized.
Home.missionQuote: "Our lifetimes lo better change chey imagination lo possible anukovadam kante baga change cheyyadaniki."
Home.basedOn: 2014 book Quiet Riots by Simon Darling based on

SuggestPage.title: New Quiet Riot suggest cheyandi

SuggestForm.publicRecognition: Naanu First Quiet Rioter na show cheyandi (uncheck cheste anonymous untanu)
SuggestForm.successMessage: Nee Quiet Riot waiting room lo undi. Setup Guide oka hour lo review chestadi. Nuvvu evidence gather cheyandi aur nee thoughts share cheyandi review avutunna boddha.

RejectionReasons.title: Quiet Riots Rejections em vala avutai
RejectionReasons.subtitle: Review process ni understand cheyandi
RejectionReasons.intro: Prathi new Quiet Riot suggestion oka Setup Guide dwara review chesthaaru. Platform fit aaina aur real difference untaai ani chusthaaru. Ee rejection reasons unnai:
RejectionReasons.closeToExistingTitle: Already Existing Quiet Riot ke Close
RejectionReasons.closeToExistingP1: Agar nee suggestion oka existing Quiet Riot ki similar unda, nee suggestion adi lo merge chestham. Ee taravata community focused aur fragmentation prevent avutadi. Oka Quiet Riot ke more people, inka big impact.
RejectionReasons.closeToExistingP2: Ee time lo nuvvu existing Quiet Riot lo automatically add aithavu. Aur nuvvu action start cheyadaniki ready untavu.
RejectionReasons.aboutPeopleP1: Quiet Riots shared issues meeda, targeted individuals meeda ledu. Nuvvu systemic problems lo focus chestham — bad broadband, rising energy costs, o inadequate healthcare — personal grievances ki ledu.
RejectionReasons.aboutPeopleP2: Agar nuvvu specific person o public figure ki frustrated unnav, ee underlying issue ni frame cheyandi. For example, eka CEO ki target cheste, company practices about Quiet Riot suggest cheyandi.
RejectionReasons.illegalP1: Nuvvu illegal activities promote o organise cheyandi valana Quiet Riots host cheyyadaniki sakam ledu. Applicable laws violate, violence promote, o people risk lo petthandi valana kacchitam ledu.
RejectionReasons.otherP1: Kada kada oka suggestion different reason vala fit nai aithe — probably it's too vague, o Setup Guide ki more information kavali. Ee cases lo nuvvu message patsthaav why aur nee cheyyadaniki em avutadi ani.
RejectionReasons.whatNextIntro: Agar nee suggestion reject ayina, nuvvu always cheyyadaniki options unnai:
RejectionReasons.reframe: Reframe aur retry cheyandi — name o description adjust cheyandi guidelines better fit cheyyadaniki
RejectionReasons.joinExisting: Existing Quiet Riot lo join cheyandi — nee issue already cover aithe untundi
RejectionReasons.replyGuide: Setup Guide ki reply cheyandi — rejection mistake ani anukuntunnav, nee case explain cheyandi

AnonymousInfo.title: Anonymous First Rioters
AnonymousInfo.subtitle: Anonymous meaning em andi
AnonymousInfo.intro: Kada kada oka new Quiet Riot start cheste, aad First Quiet Rioter authaaru. Ee badge of honour — ee person courage chesi first speak cheyindi.
AnonymousInfo.choosingIntro: Prathi okka vaadu vaad name public ga attach cheyyadaniki chusthunnaru ledu. Ee completely fine. First Quiet Rioter anonymous stay cheyyadaniki choose cheste:
AnonymousInfo.choosingHidden: Vaad name aur profile picture issue page nunchi hide aithidi
AnonymousInfo.choosingBadge: Anonymous badge show aithadi instead, aur people oka vallu start cheyindi ani telsukuntaru without knowing em vallu
AnonymousInfo.choosingGuides: Setup Guides ki still telsi untaaru vallu start cheyindi (moderation purposes vala)
AnonymousInfo.choosingChange: First Rioter ee taravata mind change cheyandi aur publicly recognised be cheyandi
AnonymousInfo.whyIntro: Marya valid reasons unnai anonymous stay cheyyadaniki:
AnonymousInfo.whyWork: Nuvvu issue nela oka company lo work chestunnav
AnonymousInfo.whyCause: Nuvvu cause inka speak cheyyadaniki prefer chestunnav
AnonymousInfo.whyPrivacy: Nuvvu simply nee privacy value chestunnav
AnonymousInfo.changingP1: Agar nuvvu oka Quiet Riot anonymous start cheyindi but ee taravata publicly recognised be cheyyadaniki decide chestunnav, nuvvu any time update cheyyadaniki sakam untaav. Nee inbox taravata o Setup Guide ki message cheyyadaniki.

FirstRioterInfo.title: First Quiet Rioter
FirstRioterInfo.subtitle: What it means to start a Quiet Riot
FirstRioterInfo.intro: Prathi Quiet Riot okati okati vyaktiga parichayinchutundi — the First Quiet Rioter. Idi adi okati issue gurinchi kopamga matladatae vundani aae movement for change start chesinadi.
FirstRioterInfo.whatIntro: Being the first person to raise an issue comes with special recognition:
FirstRioterInfo.whatBadge: A permanent First Quiet Rioter badge on the issue page
FirstRioterInfo.whatRecognition: The choice to be publicly recognised or stay anonymous
FirstRioterInfo.whatJoined: Automatic membership as the first person joined to the Quiet Riot
FirstRioterInfo.whatNotifications: Updates when your suggestion is reviewed, approved, or goes live
FirstRioterInfo.responsibilitiesTitle: What Are First Rioters Expected to Do?
FirstRioterInfo.responsibilitiesIntro: Being a First Rioter is a badge of honour, not a burden. There are no strict requirements, but we encourage First Rioters to:
FirstRioterInfo.responsibilityChampion: Champion the issue by sharing it with others who care
FirstRioterInfo.responsibilityEvidence: Share evidence and stories that illustrate the problem
FirstRioterInfo.responsibilityWelcome: Welcome new members who join the Quiet Riot
FirstRioterInfo.recognitionIntro: When you suggest a new Quiet Riot, you choose how you want to be recognised:
FirstRioterInfo.recognitionPublic: Public — your name and profile appear on the issue page as the First Rioter
FirstRioterInfo.recognitionAnonymous: Anonymous — an anonymous badge is shown instead, protecting your identity
FirstRioterInfo.recognitionChange: You can change your preference at any time through your inbox or by contacting a Setup Guide
FirstRioterInfo.howTitle: How to Become a First Rioter
FirstRioterInfo.howP1: Simply suggest a new Quiet Riot through the website or WhatsApp bot. If your suggestion is approved by the Setup Guides, you become the First Quiet Rioter for that issue.
FirstRioterInfo.howP2: Your suggestion goes through a review process where Setup Guides check it meets the guidelines. They may ask for more information, suggest merging with an existing issue, or approve it to go live.

Share.title: Your Quiet Riots Share
Share.profileLink: Learn more about your Quiet Riots share →
Share.heroSubtitle: Every Quiet Rioter worldwide is offered one share in Quiet Riots — the company itself.
Share.ownershipTitle: What Does Owning a Share Mean?
Share.ownershipDesc: As a shareholder, you own a real piece of Quiet Riots. This is not a token, a badge, or a metaphor — it is a genuine share in a UK limited company, registered with Companies House.
Share.ownershipPoint1: You become a legal co-owner of Quiet Riots
Share.ownershipPoint2: Your share grows in value as the company grows
Share.ownershipPoint3: You may receive dividends if the company distributes profits
Share.ownershipPoint4: You have shareholder rights under UK company law
Share.considerationDesc: Under UK company law (Companies Act 2006), shares cannot be issued for free. A nominal payment — called the consideration — is required for the share to be legally valid.
Share.considerationAmount: The consideration for your share is 10 pence (or the equivalent in your local currency).
Share.considerationWallet: This is deducted from your Quiet Riots wallet when you proceed.
Share.considerationRefund: If your application is rejected, the 10p is automatically refunded to your wallet.
Share.growthSharesTitle: How This Works at Different Valuations
Share.growthSharesDesc: Your share uses a growth share structure — a special class that only becomes valuable above a certain company valuation. This means minimal tax at the time of issue.
Share.preSeedDesc: Shares issued at nominal value. You pay 10p. No meaningful tax event.
Share.seedDesc: Same nominal value. Growth share hurdle set above current valuation.
Share.seriesADesc: Pre-emption rights waived for user share pool. Hurdle minimises current value.
Share.seriesBDesc: Growth share hurdle ensures limited current value despite high company valuation.
Share.seriesCDesc: User share pool is a defined cap table percentage. No new dilutive issuances.
Share.ipoDesc: User shares convert to ordinary tradeable shares. Capital gains tax may apply on sale.
Share.responsibilitiesDesc: Owning a share comes with some responsibilities:
Share.responsibility1: Tax obligations depend on your country of residence — consult a qualified advisor
Share.responsibility2: There is no guarantee the company will reach any valuation
Share.responsibility3: The share structure may be modified as the company grows
Share.responsibility4: This is not legal, tax, or investment advice
Share.disclaimer1: This is a simplified explanation — not legal, tax, or investment advice.
Share.disclaimer2: Each user's tax obligations depend on their country of residence.
Share.disclaimer3: There is no guarantee the company will reach any valuation.
Share.disclaimer4: The share structure may be modified as the company grows.
Share.disclaimer5: Users should consult qualified advisors in their own country.
Share.eligibilityDesc: To qualify for the share offer, you need to:
Share.eligibilityVerified: Be a verified user (name and email or phone confirmed)
Share.eligibilityMet: You are eligible for your share!
Share.proceedDesc: Ready to become a shareholder? The 10p consideration will be deducted from your wallet.
Share.proceedConfirm: A nominal payment of 10p will be deducted from your wallet. This is a legal requirement for the share to be valid.
Share.proceedSuccess: Your application has been submitted! A Share Guide will review it shortly.
Share.insufficientFunds: You need at least 10p in your wallet to proceed.
Share.declineDesc: If you don't want a share, you can permanently decline the offer. No payment will be taken.
Share.declineConfirm: Are you sure? This is permanent and cannot be undone. You will never be offered a share again.
Share.declineSuccess: You have declined the share offer.
Share.withdrawDesc: Cancel your application and receive a full refund of your 10p.
Share.withdrawConfirm: Are you sure? Your 10p will be refunded to your wallet.
Share.withdrawSuccess: Your application has been withdrawn. 10p has been refunded to your wallet.
Share.reapplyDesc: Your previous application was rejected. You can reapply with a fresh 10p payment.
Share.passwordDesc: The share section is password-protected for your security.
Share.identityDesc: To complete your share application, we need to verify your identity. This information is encrypted and stored securely.
Share.identitySuccess: Your identity has been submitted for verification.
Share.identityMustBe18: You must be at least 18 years old.
Share.issueEligibilityBanner: You are eligible for your share
Share.issueRequestReceived: Your request has been received. We will be in contact in due course.

BotMessages.verifyEmailPlaceholder: Viniyogadaaruku WhatsApp sthaanabharti email undi. Nijamaina email set cheyadaaniki link_email upayoginchhandi.
BotMessages.shareNeedMore: Arhatha saadhinchadaaniki meeku {riots} marinni Quiet Riots mariyu {actions} marinni charyalu avasaram.
BotMessages.shareEligible: Mee Quiet Riots share-ku meeru arhulu! Mee profile-nu sandarshinchandi leda konasaaginchadaaniki "apply for share" ani cheppandi.
BotMessages.shareQualified: Mee Quiet Riots share-ku meeru arhulu!
BotMessages.shareProgress: Purogathi: {riotsJoined}/3 Quiet Riots cheraru, {actionsTaken}/10 charyalu theesukunnaaru{verificationNote}.
BotMessages.shareNotEligible: Meeru inkaa share-ku arhulu kaadu. Marinni Quiet Riots-lo cherandi mariyu marinni charyalu theesukondi.
BotMessages.shareInsufficientBalance: Wallet balance saripoledi. Meeku kaneesam 10p avasaram (meeku {balance}p undi). Modalau mee wallet-nu top up cheyandi.
BotMessages.shareApplied: Mee wallet nunchi 10p theesiveyabadindi. Mee share darakhastu ippudu sameekshalo undi. Okaa Share Guide thvaraloney deenini sameekshistaru.
BotMessages.shareDeclined: Meeru share offer-nu shaashwatamgaa thiraskaarincharu. Chellinpu theesukobaledi. Ee nirnayaanni raddu cheyaleru.
BotMessages.shareCannotDecline: Thiraskaarinchaleru — meeku arhamaaina share offer ledu leda mee darakhastu ippathike pragatilo undi.
BotMessages.shareWithdrawn: Mee share darakhastu upasanharinchbadindi mariyu mee 10p mee wallet-ku thirigi vachchindi.
BotMessages.shareCannotWithdraw: Upasanharinchaleru — mee darakhastu upasanharana sthithilo undakapovachu.
BotMessages.shareReapplied: Mee wallet nunchi 10p theesiveyabadindi. Mee share malli darakhastu ippudu sameekshalo undi.
BotMessages.shareCannotReapply: Malli darakhastu cheyaleru — mee darakhastu thiraskarinchbadina sthithilo undakapovachu.
BotMessages.shareQuestionSent: Mee prashna Share Guide brundaaniki pampabadindi. Meeru mee inbox-lo samaadhaanam andukuntaru.
BotMessages.suggestionApproved: Manchi varta — mi Quiet Riot "{name}" amodinchabadindi! Idi pratyakshaminappudu miku teliyadjestamu.
BotMessages.suggestionRejectedWithLink: Mi suchana "{name}" 👍 pondaledu endukante {reason}. Marinta telusukondi: https://www.quietriots.com/info/rejection-reasons
BotMessages.suggestionMerged: Mi suchana "{name}" ippudike unna Quiet Riot-ki samanamga undi. Mimmalni cherchamu — chudandi: {link}
BotMessages.suggestionMoreInfo: Setup Guide-ki "{name}" gurinchi oka prashna undi: {notes}
BotMessages.suggestionGoLive: Mi Quiet Riot "{name}" ippudu pratyakshamga undi! I samasyapai shraddha unna snehitulato panchukondri.
BotMessages.rejectionCloseToExisting: ippudike unna Quiet Riot-ki chala samanam
